summary: Frontend testing for Supplier-Manufacturer role merge. All features verified working: Login page shows 4 roles (no Supplier), Registration page shows 3 roles (no Supplier), Manufacturer dashboard has full PO management with Accept/Reject buttons, Brand dashboard shows 'Manufacturer Directory' (not Supplier), Admin dashboard shows 'Registered Manufacturers' and 'Manufacturer Overview'. Brand→Manufacturer PO flow working end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: Role merge implemented correctly - UserRole enum has 4 roles (admin, manufacturer, brand, auditor)
Manufacturer description updated to 'Create batches, manage production, receive POs'
Brand description correctly shows 'Track suppliers, request audits, create POs'
All supplier-related UI text successfully renamed to manufacturer
seed_data_creation: Created test PO via Brand dashboard for Manufacturer acceptance testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier role has been fully merged into Manufacturer. All 4 roles (Admin, Manufacturer, Brand, Auditor) working correctly. Manufacturers now handle PO management (previously Supplier functionality). Brand creates POs to Manufacturers. Existing 'Test Supplier Co' in database is now a Manufacturer entry visible in Manufacturer Directory.

login_page_4_roles.notes: Demo credential buttons visible for Admin, Manufacturer, Brand, Auditor - NO Supplier

registration_page_3_roles.notes: Role dropdown shows Manufacturer, Brand, Auditor only - NO Supplier

manufacturer_accepts_po.notes: Accept button works, status changes, pending count decreases, active orders increase

features: Create PO button per manufacturer entry

brand_creates_po.notes: PO dialog opens, all fields fillable, total auto-calculates, success toast shown, PO appears in list

features: Manufacturer Overview section with Total Manufacturers, Avg Compliance, Risk Distribution
